name: @context-battler/throwaway-d-full-match
description: Throwaway Godot 4 WASM full-match replay prototype.

scripts.test: node scripts/verify-scaffold.mjs && if [ -n "$GODOT_BIN" ]; then "$GODOT_BIN" --path . --headless --script res://scripts/audit-character-scales.gd -- --assert; else echo "audit-character-scales: skipped (GODOT_BIN unset)"; fi
